creator: skreuzer@exit2shell.com
text:
I forgot to include the patch for MOVED

It should be attached to this.

On Thu, Jan 10, 2008 at 08:00:01PM +0000, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/119538'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.

> via this link:
